ProportionalControl.description: Proportional control indicates that the thermostat can modulate the voltage delivered to the heating and/or cooling device

ControlRange.description: Control range indicates the range in temperature (in degrees of celsius)

Profiles.description: Profiles depict the time period (hours per day, days per week) during which the thermostat will be active.

_t.description: Optional Type discirminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
